results.query: What are the main competition risks Apple faces?
results.notes: Core risk query — Risk Factors section must contain competition language

results.query: What did Apple say about supply chain risks in 2024?
results.notes: Supply chain is a known material risk in AAPL filings — must appear in Risk Factors

results.query: What were Apple's revenue results in fiscal year 2024?
results.notes: Use '2024' not 'fiscal 2024' to avoid exact-phrase miss; use actual revenue figure instead of 'billion'

results.query: What risks did Microsoft identify around cloud and Azure?
results.notes: Cloud risk is central to MSFT 10-K — validates section detection on MSFT

results.query: What did Microsoft say about AI investment and capital expenditure?
results.notes: AI capex discussion should appear in MD&A — tests cross-section discrimination

results.query: What did NVIDIA discuss in its Q2 2024 earnings outlook?
results.notes: Earnings transcripts have no Risk Factors section — forward-looking language appears in Outlook

results.query: What did Tesla say about vehicle delivery and production in Q3 2024?
results.notes: 10-Q Item 2 (MD&A) not yet in SECTION_MAP — content propagates under Item 1: Financial Statements. Known gap: 10-Q section map needs Item 2 added.

results.query: What liquidity and cash position did Tesla report?
results.notes: Liquidity is a standard MD&A subsection — content in Item 1: Financial Statements until 10-Q section map is extended.

results.query: What regulatory and legal risks did Apple disclose?
results.notes: Regulatory risk is a distinct subsection in AAPL Risk Factors — tests intra-section granularity

results.query: What did Microsoft say about cybersecurity risks?
results.notes: Cybersecurity is explicitly called out in MSFT filings — high confidence expected match
